Brown to dark brown gravelly loam (medial-skeletal, frigid ultic). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.alfisol.haploxeralf.coarse.87P313.spectrum.txt

The parent material is eolian sand from upland slope in level or undulating plains. Brown loamy fine sand (sandy, mixed, thermic psammentic). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.alfisol.haplustalf.coarse.87P3468.spectrum.txt

The parent material is eolian from acidic-ash material over volcanic ash from acidic-ash material over residuum. from a 6% north facing slope. Brown fine sandy loam (loamy, mixed, mesic, shallow aridic). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.alfisol.haplustalf.coarse.87P3671.spectrum.txt

The parent material is eolian from level or undulating plains. Reddish brown fine sandy loam (fine-loamy, mixed thermic aridic). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.alfisol.paleustalf.coarse.87P2376.spectrum.txt

The parent material is granitic rock from level or undulating plains. Brown sandy loam (fine, mixed, thermic udic). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.alfisol.paleustalf.coarse.87P2410.spectrum.txt

The parent material is volcanic ash from mixed material. Brown silty loam (coarse-loamy, mixed, mesic xerollic). Physiography: in plateaus or tablelands. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.aridisol.camborthid.coarse.87P337.spectrum.txt

The parent material is alluvium from mixed material from upland slope in coastal plains. Brown to dark brown sand (coated, mesic typic). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.entisol.quartzipsamment.coarse.87P706.spectrum.txt
The parent material is eolian from evaporites. White gypsum dune sand. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.entisol.torripsamment.coarse.0015.spectrum.txt
Very dark grayish brown silty loam. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.inceptisol.plaggept.coarse.85P3707.spectrum.txt

The parent material is volcanic ash from ejecta-ash material over local colluvium from cinders material from hillside or mountainside in mountains or deeply dissected plateaus. Brown to dark brown gravelly fine sandy loam (medial-skeletal, frigid andic). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.inceptisol.xerumbrept.coarse.87P325.spectrum.txt

Very dark grayish brown loam, (loamy-skeletal, mixed, typic). Physiography: plateaus or tablelands. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.mollisol.cryoboroll.coarse.87P4453.spectrum.txt

Parent material is alluvium from mixed materials. Brown to dark brown sandy loam, (fine-loamy, mixed, thermic cumulic). Physiography: flood plain in river valley. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.mollisol.hapludoll.coarse.87P764.spectrum.txt

Parent material: alluvium from mixed material. Physiography: upland slope in coastal plain, cropland. Brown to dark brown loamy sand (sandy, siliceous, mesic psammentic). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.soil.utisol.hapludult.coarse.87P707.spectrum.txt
